name: port_insdrain
drl: rule W2 when accumulate( E0($t : ts) over window:time(150ms) from entry-point "S1"; $c : sum($t) ) then end
_finding: CEP A2 (D-155 port guard): revival coalesces with a SAME-epoch event insert (evict at the advance, ts-update revives, insert adds: one fire 405 = 200+205). Guards the drain-vs-stream-flush interaction: pending winacc entries drain at the FIRE boundary only — draining at the insert's position tripped the per-arrival flush's segment scoping and lost the revival.
